name: Vatsanabha
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies all three doshas.
mainMedicinalUses: Used in minute doses for severe fevers and joint pain.
Acts as a powerful heart and respiratory stimulant.
Ingredient in many classical pills like 'Ananda Bhairava Rasa'.
plantProfile: Considered a 'Mahavisha' (Great Poison); must be purified in cow milk.

dosages.Adults: 8-16mg ONLY. HIGHLY POISONOUS IF NOT PURIFIED.

safetyProfile: UNSAFE EXCEPT IN HIGHLY PURIFIED MINUTE DOSES UNDER EXPERT CARE.
